name: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited engages in research and development, production, and sale of electric vehicle and energy storage battery systems in China and internationally. The company's Li-ion batteries are used in electric passenger vehicles, electric buses, electric trucks, and other special vehicles; and energy storage systems are used in renewable energy, grid frequency modulation, communication base station, commercial and industrial building, and household energy storage. Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Ningde, China.
